A Parkour Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can use pillars, walls, and platforms to create obstacle courses and enjoy building challenges with others.

title: Sky: Children of the Light
notes:
Art You Can Walk Through
Explore beautiful, playable environments made from Van Gogh's best known paintings, from sunlit fields in the Netherlands to the glowing night skies that only he could imagine. Each and every landscape is a work of art in motion, rendered in his bold, expressive brushstroke style and alive with the emotion he poured into every canvas.

notes:
Update Note 
-This is a mandatory update, after which you should download and install the app again manually. Please log in and bind your account to at least one third-party account before the update if you are currently using a guest account to play the game.

title: Capybara Go!
notes: Bug fixes and content optimization

title: Screwdom
notes:
New Event: Puzzle Pieces. Complete levels and collect puzzle pieces to earn special rewards.
New Seasonal: Summer Pass. Enjoy a sunny adventure packed with exclusive rewards.
Bug fixes and performance improvements.

title: Coin Master - Board Adventure
notes: Welcome to Coin Master: Board Adventure, where every dice roll takes you closer to riches, revenge, and all-out fun! Collect coins, attack villages, build your empire, and explore wild new boards full of surprises. It's not just a board game - it's a bold adventure!

title: Merge Cooking®
notes:
Welcome back, Chef!
A new version of Merge Cooking is available!
To provide a better experience, we're working hard to optimize the game performance as well as bring you exciting content.
We hope you can enjoy the time playing!
New to the game? Don't worry. We've prepared step-by-step instructions to guide you through. Join us and have some fun.

title: Brawl Stars
notes:
UPDATE 68: RAMEN REBELLION
July 2026 - August 2026
∙ Cyberpunk comes to Starr Park, as a mysterious technology infects Brawlers…
∙ Join an epic adventure, where Kenji & Kaze fight to save Katana Kingdom and their child…
∙ The new Brawler NORI (Legendary Assassin)! A kid with special powers.
∙ New Brawler WENDY (Mythic Support) an eco-friendly weapons scientist.
∙ Unlock new NanoPowers and Fusion abilities to power up your Brawlers!
∙ Brawl Pass Season 52: NanoNoodles
∙ Brawl Pass Season 53: Wind

title: Tennis Clash：Sports Stars Game
notes:
Hey, Challengers!

Kaká's Signature Move is here! As he consumes stamina, he gains bonuses to his Agility and more power in his forehand and backhand. Jump into Ace Academy and get this amazing signature move!

See you on the court!
